description: Weight on process-intrinsic risk (from risk_process_matrix.csv) in Likelihood formula. Higher weight = process mattering more than country.
Weight on country-level hazard indicator in Likelihood formula. Must sum to 1 with likelihood_process_weight.
Weight on Ecological Sensitivity in Severity formula.
Weight on Regulatory Strictness in Severity formula. Higher strictness = higher penalty exposure when incidents occur.
Likelihood cap for process/risk combos where risk_process_matrix.applies = N.
Overall (LxS) score at or below this is bucketed Low.
Overall score at or below this is bucketed Moderate.
Overall score at or below this is bucketed High.
Overall score at or below this is bucketed Critical. Max possible is 25.
